message:
test(search): refine scorer tests to distinguish prefix, exact, and substring match tiers

Restructure scorer test suite to precisely validate three distinct
scoring paths: prefix matching (renamed from generic "substring"),
exact matching with expected score calculations using FIELD_WEIGHTS,
and true substring fallback for non-prefix matches. Aligns test
assertions with the actual prefix search scorer behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
